label: Subagent • live image generate
query: Generate an image from a prompt.
notes: LIVE. Runs the real ImageTool (no source_paths -> generate mode) through the host + ImageSubagentKind. Auto-approves the permission prompt headlessly. SKIPS on any host where image delegation is off or no image model is ready (rejected/unavailable). To run it: enable image generation and pick a default image model in Spawn & Delegation settings.

subagent.prompt: a simple flat red circle centered on a white background
